thesis: Traceability and reliability would be the earliest trust wedge for ProductOS.
supporting_signals: Leadership repeatedly asked for stronger evidence visibility.
Workflow and artifact design already favored explicit provenance.
later_outcome: The thesis proved correct, but it did not fully differentiate ProductOS at the strategy layer.
lesson: Trust is necessary but insufficient; the system also needs upstream strategic leverage.
repeated_traps: Over-optimizing for polished outputs before distinct option framing exists.
